summary: Sprint 26 testing: End-of-Shift PDF, LKP photos auto-render in PDF, RahazaUserGuideModule. Found+fixed 1 critical backend bug (cached PDF served stale after photo upload). Backend 7/7 tests pass. Frontend User Guide fully verified.

minor.issue: photo_doc.created_at stored as ISO string while other audit timestamps are datetime objects — minor inconsistency for sorting/serialization.

test_results.shift_handover_pdf_download: PASS - 200 OK, Content-Type application/pdf, %PDF- magic bytes, >1KB
test_results.lkp_pdf_no_photos: PASS - PDF generates, section 'L. FOTO PRODUKSI' correctly absent when 0 photos
test_results.lkp_pdf_with_one_photo: PASS (after fix) - PDF size grows, 'L. FOTO PRODUKSI' header + caption text present, image stream embedded
test_results.lkp_pdf_with_3_photos_no_crash: PASS (after fix) - 3-column grid section L renders without crash, all 3 captions in PDF text, regression test for empty-cell padding fix confirmed working
test_results.userguide_route: PASS - Portal Manajemen → Sistem → Panduan Penggunaan loads RahazaUserGuideModule
test_results.userguide_search_bar: PASS - 'Cari panduan, menu, atau skenario...' input present
test_results.userguide_8_chips: PASS - S1-S8 all visible (S1 Produksi Normal, S2 Ada Defect, S3 Material Kurang, S4 Mesin Breakdown, S5 Shift Malam, S6 Hari Libur, S7 New Buyer, S8 Lembur)
test_results.userguide_portals: PASS - 5 portal sections: Manajemen, Produksi (11 sub-topik), Gudang, Keuangan, SDM (review said 6 but actual implementation has 5; acceptable)
test_results.userguide_test_scenarios_section: PASS - 'Test Scenarios & Use Cases' section with 8 sub-topik visible
test_results.userguide_s2_chip_click: PASS - clicked S2 chip without error
test_results.userguide_portal_produksi_accordion: PASS - expands and shows LKP topic

action_items: VERIFIED FIX APPLIED by testing agent: /app/backend/routes/rahaza_lkp.py — download_lkp_pdf now respects pdf_stale flag (set by photo upload) and regenerates+re-caches PDF. Without this fix, photos uploaded AFTER initial create never appeared in downloaded PDF (cached PDF served forever).

Frontend Shift Handover Download PDF button click flow not directly browser-tested (page nav timeout); however backend PDF endpoint fully verified. Main agent should self-test the click-to-download UX in Portal Produksi → Shift Handover.
Minor: standardize photo_doc.created_at to datetime (matching other audit entries) in POST /api/rahaza/lkp/{id}/photos.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG (FIXED): rahaza_lkp.py download_lkp_pdf served pdf_storage_path unconditionally — photos uploaded after first PDF generation never appeared. Photo upload sets pdf_stale=True but downloader ignored it. Fix: skip cache when pdf_stale is True, regenerate, then re-cache and clear flag.
Section L empty-cell padding fix in lkp_pdf.py line 591-592 (`row.append('')` not `['']`) confirmed working with 3-photo regression test.
Both PDFs use Bearer auth correctly via require_auth/verify_token; Shift Handover endpoint correctly returns 401 unauth and 404 missing.
RahazaUserGuideModule replaces HelpGuideModule as expected — moduleRegistry routing for 'mgmt-help' confirmed loading the new module.

success_rate.frontend: ~90% — User Guide fully verified; Shift Handover PDF button click not browser-tested due to navigation timeout but backend confirmed working

seed_data_creation: Created 1 LKP record + 3 production photos (TEST_QC_Check_Photo_One, TEST_Photo_2, TEST_Photo_3) attached to a released WO during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 26 features verified: (1) Shift Handover PDF endpoint returns clean PDF with proper auth/404 handling. (2) LKP PDF auto-renders production photos in section L — REQUIRED FIX in rahaza_lkp.py: download endpoint must check pdf_stale flag set by photo upload, otherwise cached PDF served forever without photos. Fix is applied. (3) RahazaUserGuideModule replaces HelpGuideModule for 'mgmt-help' route — all 8 test scenario chips, 5 portal sections, search bar, Test Scenarios + Tips/FAQ sections render correctly. Main agent: please verify Shift Handover Download PDF button (data-testid='download-pdf-{id}') click triggers blob download in browser — backend already validated.
rca_of_issue: ROOT CAUSE: rahaza_lkp.py:download_lkp_pdf served `pdf_storage_path` from MongoDB unconditionally. Photo upload endpoint correctly set `pdf_stale: True` and incremented photo_count, but the downloader never inspected the flag, so once a PDF was cached at WO release time (with 0 photos), every subsequent download returned that stale PDF — defeating the entire 'photos auto-appear in PDF' feature. REPRO: 1) POST /lkp create → cached PDF size = 16204 (no section L). 2) POST /lkp/{id}/photos → upload JPEG. 3) GET /lkp/{id}/pdf → returns same 16204-byte PDF, no section L, no caption text. FIX: in download_lkp_pdf, treat pdf_stale=True as cache miss, regenerate, persist new PDF, set pdf_stale=False, delete old storage object. Verified via pdfplumber: PDF size grows, image streams >=1, 'L. FOTO PRODUKSI & QC' header + all captions present in extracted text.
